title: Stern's Default Tweaks
description: WIP Resource Pack that changes the sun & moon to be round, but still fit the vanilla aesthetic!
body:
Welcome to my very first attempt on creating a Resource Pack for Minecraft!

I have a lot of plans for this Pack, but as of now, it only replaces the sun and moon with a round variant, also makes the moon fractured. If you would like a normal version, let me know!

Gallery tab for images!

That's all for now, I don't know how frequently I will update this.
